scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:integration
scripts.test:integration: bun --env-file=test-app/.env packages/engine/src/store.test.ts && bun --env-file=test-app/.env packages/engine/src/hub.test.ts && bun --env-file=test-app/.env packages/engine/src/db-notify.test.ts && bun --env-file=test-app/.env packages/engine/src/watcher.test.ts
